questions.text: What main benefit does Kiro offer for enterprise teams?

options.label: Standardization of development workflows through shared Specs and Steering
Generation of individual productivity reports for each developer on the team
Elimination of the need for code review

questions.explanation: For enterprise teams, Kiro offers workflow standardization through shared Specs and Steering in the repository, ensuring consistency in development practices.

questions.text: Steering files in the repository (.kiro/steering/) are automatically shared with the entire team via version control.
questions.explanation: Steering files in .kiro/steering/ are part of the repository and shared with the entire team via Git, ensuring everyone follows the same development guidelines.

questions.text: A team of 20 developers needs to ensure everyone follows security standards when creating APIs. Which combination of Kiro features is most effective?

options.label: Steering files with security rules + Hooks that validate before each code write
Define security rules only in a Skill that each developer manually activates when creating APIs
Manual review of each pull request by a security specialist

questions.explanation: The combination of Steering files (defining security rules in .kiro/steering/) with Hooks (automatically validating before writes via preToolUse) ensures continuous and automatic enforcement of security standards across the entire team.
